# Related Customizations

Consider creating these later if the workflow becomes frequent.

- `filament-5-user-resource`: focused only on UserResource CRUD, roles/permissions UI, tables, forms, policies, and soft deletes.
- `filament-5-tenancy-security-review`: checklist for tenant scoping, validation, middleware, custom queries, and data-leak risks.
- `filament-5-auth-page-customization`: narrower workflow for custom login, registration, password reset, email verification, and profile pages.
- `filament-5-mfa`: narrower workflow for app/email multi-factor authentication setup and review.
